faq.title: Questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Lompoc Locals.
faq.q1: Is Lompoc Locals free to use?
faq.a1: Yes, completely. Browsing deals and claiming them is always free for Lompoc residents. No account required to browse.
faq.q2: How do I claim a deal?
faq.a2: Click "Claim Deal" on any offer, then show your phone at the business.
faq.a3: Sign up as a business (free) and create your profile in under 5 minutes. Posting deals requires the Growth plan ($39.99/mo), which unlocks up to 15 active deals.
faq.q4: What does it cost to list my business?
faq.a4: Our Free plan is $0 forever — your business listed with hours, photos, and contact info. Growth is $39.99/month and unlocks deals (up to 15 active), analytics, and priority placement.
faq.a5: For now, yes. We're 100% focused on Lompoc. That's what makes it work — every deal is from someone local, for someone local.
faq.q6: How do I get the weekly deals email?
faq.a6: Create a free account and subscribe to the weekly digest. Every Saturday morning, the top 10 deals go straight to your inbox.

hotels.aboutSpaceBody: Closest civilian town to Vandenberg Space Force Base. Watch launches from the valley — public viewing at Surf Beach and Renwick.

hotels.dealsHookBody: Lompoc restaurants and shops post specials all week — see what's on while you're here.

hero.subtitle: Lompoc Locals is the free, hometown-first directory for the Lompoc Valley. Post your coupons, specials, and announcements in 30 seconds — and reach the people already searching for the shops they love.
hero.trustLine: ✓ Free forever for the basics  ·  ✓ No credit card  ·  ✓ 30-second setup
hero.newThisWeek: Dashboards for hours, photos, social links, and listing claims.

howItWorks.subtitle: No demos. No sales calls. No 47-page contracts. Just sign up and post.
howItWorks.step1Body: Find your business in our directory and click 'Claim it,' or list a brand-new one in 30 seconds. Free forever.
howItWorks.step2Body: Logo, hours, social links, and a description. Your profile goes live the moment our admin approves it (usually same-day).
howItWorks.step3Body: Coupons, specials, announcements — post as many as you want, edit anytime, expire whenever. Locals see them on the feed.

benefits.b1Body: Every visitor is searching for businesses right here. No tourists, no out-of-towners — just locals.
benefits.b2Body: Post coupons, specials, and announcements. One flat monthly fee — no per-deal charges, no pay-to-win tricks.
benefits.b3Body: See exactly how many people viewed your profile and clicked through to your site. No mystery.
benefits.b4Body: Your best deal goes out in our Saturday email to confirmed Lompoc locals. Free distribution.
benefits.b5Body: Repeat customers save your deals to their favorites. Build a following without spending on ads.
benefits.b6Body: It's your listing. Edit, expire, or remove anything. We never run ads on your profile or sell your data.

pricing.subtitle: Start free to get listed. Post deals and reach locals with Growth. Go Plus for top placement with digest ads included.
pricing.standardFeature3: Featured in the weekly deals digest
pricing.premiumFeature5: 1 Featured Deal of the Week rotation / mo
pricing.footnote: Free lists your business. Deals start on Growth. Plus bundles ~$128/mo of digest ad placements. Cancel anytime.
pricing.plusValueNote: Bundles ~$128/mo of digest ad placements — Plus pays for itself.
pricing.helperTitle: Which plan is right for you?
pricing.helperFreeQ: Just want to show up when locals search?
pricing.helperGrowthQ: Ready to post deals and hit the weekly digest?
pricing.helperPlusQ: Want top billing with featured ads handled for you?

dashboardPayouts.payoutsInfo1: Lompoc Locals uses Stripe Connect to process and distribute payouts to business owners.
dashboardPayouts.payoutsInfo2: A platform fee applies to each payout — contact support for current rates.
dashboardPayouts.payoutsInfo3: Payouts are processed by Stripe on a standard schedule (typically 2 business days after funds are available).
dashboardPayouts.payoutsInfo4: Use Stripe test mode during development — no real money is moved.

privacy.metaDescription: How Lompoc Locals collects, uses, and protects your personal information. California CCPA/CPRA rights included.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: Lompoc Locals (operated by [Founder Name / Entity Placeholder]) is a local business directory and promotions platform serving the Lompoc, California area. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect information about you when you visit our website or use our services. By using Lompoc Locals, you agree to the practices described in this policy. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the site.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.body: We collect information you provide directly and information generated by your use of the site.
collection.accountInfo: Account information: When you register, we collect your name, email address, and a hashed version of your password (we never store passwords in plain text).
collection.businessInfo: Business information: When you claim or list a business, we collect your business name, address, phone number, category, hours, and any photos or promotional content you upload.
collection.browsingData: Browsing data: We automatically collect your IP address, browser type, referring URL, locale preference, and pages visited via server logs and session cookies.
collection.paymentInfo: Payment information: Payments are processed entirely by Stripe. We do not store your full card number or CVV. Stripe may share a transaction ID and last-four digits with us for billing records.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.intro: We use the information we collect to:
items: Operate the directory and display business listings and deals
Send the weekly email digest (only if you subscribe)
Process payments for premium business subscriptions via Stripe
Authenticate your account and maintain session security
Moderate content and prevent fraudulent or spam listings
Respond to your support requests
Comply with applicable laws and legal obligations
Improve site performance and user experience through analytics

thirdParties.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParties.intro: We share limited data with trusted service providers who help us operate the site:
items: Stripe — Handles all payment processing for premium subscriptions. Stripe has its own Privacy Policy.
Resend — Sends transactional emails (account confirmations, password resets) and the optional weekly digest.
Vercel — Hosts the website and serves all web traffic.
Neon — Provides our cloud PostgreSQL database where account and business data is stored.
Mapbox — Powers the interactive business map. Mapbox may receive your approximate location when you view the map.
Anthropic — Powers the AI chat assistant feature on the site. Chat messages you send may be processed by Anthropic's Claude API.
Vercel Blob — Stores business photos and uploaded images.
thirdParties.noSale: We do not sell your personal information to any third party.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking
cookies.body: We use two first-party cookies: an authentication session cookie (to keep you logged in) and a locale preference cookie (to remember your language setting). We do not use third-party advertising trackers, retargeting pixels, or cross-site tracking cookies. You can disable cookies in your browser settings; doing so may prevent login and some site features from working.

privacy.sessionCookieBody: We set a first-party cookie named lompoc_sid containing a random session identifier so we can measure how features are used. It contains no personal information, expires after one year, and is not shared with third parties.

california.title: Your California Privacy Rights (CCPA / CPRA)
california.intro: If you are a California resident, you have the following rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA):
items: Right to Know: You may request a copy of the personal information we hold about you and how we use it.
Right to Delete: You may request deletion of your personal information, subject to certain exceptions.
Right to Correct: You may request correction of inaccurate personal information.
Right to Opt-Out of Sale: We do not sell your personal information. There is nothing to opt out of.
Right to Non-Discrimination: We will not discriminate against you for exercising any of these rights.
california.howToExercise: To exercise these rights, email us at hello@lompocdeals.com. We will respond within 45 days as required by law.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.body: We retain your account information for as long as your account is active. If you request account deletion, we will delete or anonymize your personal data within 30 days, except where we are legally required to retain certain records. Business listing data and deal history may be retained in anonymized form for historical and analytical purposes.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.body: Lompoc Locals is not directed at children under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we become aware that we have collected such information, we will delete it promptly. This site complies with the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA).

security.title: Security
security.body: We take reasonable measures to protect your information. Passwords are hashed using bcrypt before storage — we never store plain-text passwords. All data transmitted between your browser and our servers is encrypted via TLS/HTTPS. Our database is hosted on Neon, which provides encryption at rest. Despite these measures, no internet transmission is 100% secure.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The date at the top of this page reflects when the policy was last revised. For material changes that affect your rights, we will notify you via email (if you have an account) or by displaying a prominent notice on the site. Your continued use of Lompoc Locals after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

contactSection.title: Contact Us
contactSection.body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us at:

terms.metaDescription: Terms governing your use of Lompoc Locals — account registration, subscription plans, user content rules, and California governing law.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using Lompoc Locals (the "Site"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Site. We may update these terms at any time; continued use after changes are posted constitutes acceptance.

description.title: Description of Service
description.body: Lompoc Locals is a local business directory and promotions platform serving Lompoc, California and the surrounding Lompoc Valley. The Site allows local businesses to post coupons, specials, and announcements, and allows community members to browse deals, view a business map, and subscribe to a weekly email digest.

registration.title: Account Registration
registration.body: To access certain features you must register for an account. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update that information to keep it accurate. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us immediately at hello@lompocdeals.com if you suspect unauthorized access.

subscriptions.title: Subscription Plans
subscriptions.intro: We offer the following subscription plans for business accounts:
items: Free — Basic listing at no charge; includes profile page, map pin, hours, and contact info.
Growth ($39.99/month) — Enhanced listing with up to 15 active deals, priority placement, and analytics.
Plus ($99.99/month) — All Growth features plus featured homepage placement, social media links, and property/hotel listings.
subscriptions.billing: Paid plans are billed monthly and renew automatically via Stripe. You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account dashboard; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. Refunds are at our discretion and will generally not be issued for partial months, except where required by law.

ugc.title: User-Generated Content
ugc.body: You retain ownership of any content you post on Lompoc Locals (deal descriptions, photos, business information, etc.). By posting content, you grant Lompoc Locals a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to display, reproduce, and distribute that content in connection with operating the Site. You represent that your content is accurate, lawful, and related to your business in the Lompoc area. We reserve the right to moderate, edit, or remove content that violates these Terms or applicable law.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Conduct
items: Post spam, misleading promotions, or content unrelated to your Lompoc business
Scrape, crawl, or systematically download data from the Site without our written consent
Post illegal content, including content that infringes intellectual property rights
Impersonate another business, person, or entity
Harass, threaten, or intimidate other users
Attempt to bypass, disable, or circumvent any security or access controls
Use the Site for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any applicable regulation

listings.title: Business Listings
listings.body: Business listings on Lompoc Locals must represent legitimate businesses operating within the Lompoc Valley, including ZIP codes 93436, 93437, and 93438. Listings that are fraudulent, inactive, or outside our service area may be removed without notice. We reserve the right to approve or reject any listing at our sole discretion.

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.body: All content on the Site created by Lompoc Locals — including designs, logos, code, and editorial text — is owned by or licensed to Lompoc Locals and may not be copied or used without permission. User-generated content remains the property of the respective users.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers
disclaimers.body: The Site and all content are provided on an "as-is" and "as-available" basis without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service, the accuracy or completeness of business listings, or that specific results will be achieved by using the Site.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by California law, Lompoc Locals and its operators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of your use of the Site. In any event, our aggregate liability to you shall not exceed the greater of (a) the total amounts you have paid to us in the 12 months preceding the claim, or (b) $200.00.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account and access to the Site at any time, with or without notice, for conduct that we reasonably believe violates these Terms or harms other users, third parties, or our business interests. Upon termination, your right to use the Site ceases immediately.

governing.title: Governing Law and Jurisdiction
governing.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of California, without regard to conflict-of-law principles. Any dispute arising from or related to these Terms shall be resolved exclusively in the state or federal courts located in Santa Barbara County, California. You consent to personal jurisdiction in those courts.

changesTerms.title: Changes to These Terms
changesTerms.body: We may modify these Terms at any time. For material changes, we will notify you by email (if you have an account) or by displaying a prominent notice on the Site. Your continued use of Lompoc Locals after changes take effect constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

contactSection.title: Contact Us
contactSection.body: Questions about these Terms? Contact us at:
